subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Most Glorious Beauty! That which is mentioned concerning the prolongation of life in former times is but a conventional matter, not a technical term [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال ابهی آنچه ذکر امتداد حیات سلفست امریست اعتباری نه بحسب اصطلاحی
subcodes.subjects: @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @celestial spheres [aflak]; planets; astronomy, @Noah
